exceptions.reason: role is only "alert" when tone==="danger" (paired with aria-live="assertive"); every other tone -- including the default, neutral -- renders role="status" with aria-live="polite" instead.

Toast.jsx itself has no timer, but its own doc comment describes toasts as auto-dismissed by "the host" by default, and describes `persist` as "mandatory in critical/error states" to opt out. Nothing in this file enforces persist=true when tone="danger" -- that safeguard is a documented convention for the caller, not code, so a danger toast can still be rendered to disappear on a timer.
